summary: Versatile developer with over 2 year of experience specializing in Node.js, Express.js, and Vue.js, and React.js.
A firm believer in writing code with simplicity, reusability in mind, and with absolute finesse.
Possesses strong knowledge of MySQL and MongoDB databases, excelling in creating robust database schemas.
Passionate about the world of DevOps, from deployment to software maintenance and monitoring.
Currently expanding skills to include Next.js and ASP.NET within the .NET ecosystem.
considerationNote: I respectfully request you to consider my ability, job performance, and adaptability more so than my resume if you offer me the chance to supply my services to your company, as I am confident enough to say that I will do so to the best pleasure of my superiors.
